Bus Timings

24 Bus Timetable Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre to Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1

December 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai’s Bus 24 is a vital route that connects Dubai Festival City to Al Nahda, providing a convenient and reliable means of transportation for daily commuters and travelers. The bus route serves various key locations, making it an essential service for those commuting between these areas.

Bus Timings

At the Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre departure point, the 24 bus operates at frequent intervals throughout the day, providing passengers with flexible travel options. Below is the typical timetable for Bus 24:

From Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre From Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1
05:45 06:21
06:10 06:46
06:24 07:00
06:35 07:11
06:45 07:21
07:05 07:41
07:20 07:56
07:35 08:11
07:45 08:21
08:05 08:41
08:15 08:51
08:30 09:06
08:40 09:16
08:55 09:31
09:05 09:41
09:15 09:51
09:35 10:11
10:00 10:36
10:30 11:06
11:00 11:36
11:30 12:06
12:00 12:36
12:30 13:06
13:00 13:36
13:28 14:04
14:00 14:36
14:30 15:06
15:00 15:36
15:20 15:56
15:40 16:16
16:00 16:36
16:12 16:48
16:24 17:00

16:48 17:24
17:00 17:36

17:33 18:09

21:05 21:41
21:30 22:06
22:00 22:36
22:30 23:06
23:00 23:36

Download PDF Bus 24

Bus 24 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 24 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The Bus 24 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

  2. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer

  3. Collapse

  4. Mawakeb School

  5. Dubai Municipality Garage

  6. Emirates Metro

  7. Airport Terminal 1, Arrival

  8. Cargo Village

  9. Burj Al Noor

  10. Al Nahda 1, Terminus

  11. Fatma Mohammad Masjid

  12. Canary Building

  13. 12th Street

  14. Madina Supermarket

  15. Motawa Building

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Dubai Carmel School

  2. Al Qusais, Public Transport Depot

  3. Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1

Intersection of Bus Routes at Al Nahda 1, Terminus

This strategic location facilitates seamless connections between these routes, providing convenient transit options for passengers traveling within and beyond the Al Nahda area. The terminus offers essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, enhancing the overall travel experience and making it a key hub for commuters using these various bus services.

Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop serves as a significant transit point where Routes X13, F08, and 24 intersect. This location provides convenient access for students, staff, and visitors to the Emirates College, offering easy connections to various parts of Dubai. The intersection of these routes ensures seamless travel and enhances the connectivity of the Al Nahda area with other key destinations.

Also See: Everything You Need to Know About Abu Dhabi Bus 102: Route and Stops

Bus Ticket Price

The ticket price for Bus 24 is based on the standard fare rates set by the Dubai Roads and Transport Authority (RTA). Fares are determined by the distance traveled and the number of zones crossed. Typically, prices range from AED 3 to AED 7.5 for a single journey, with Nol cards providing a convenient payment method.

Bus Booking

Passengers can plan their journey and book tickets for Bus 24 through various methods:

  • Nol Card: The Nol card is a rechargeable smart card used for all forms of public transport in Dubai. It can be topped up at metro stations, bus stations, and various retail outlets.

  • RTA App: The RTA Dubai app allows users to plan their journeys, view bus schedules, and manage their Nol card balance.
  • Online Booking: Although direct online booking for single bus journeys is not typically available, the RTA app provides comprehensive information on routes and timings to help plan your trip efficiently.

Journey Experience

Starting at Dubai Festival City, a popular waterfront destination known for its shopping, dining, and the impressive Imagine light and water show, the route passes through the lively district of Deira, famous for its traditional Gold and Spice Souks and vibrant markets.

As the journey continues, the bus transitions into the quieter residential neighborhood of Al Nahda, known for its parks, schools, and family-friendly atmosphere.

Read More: Full Details on Dubai Bus F41: Route and Stops

Traveling with Careem

The journey using Careem falls within a price range of AED 48-58, providing a flexible and comfortable alternative to public transport.

Dubai’s Bus 24 offers a crucial link between Dubai Festival City and Al Nahda, serving key stops and providing frequent services throughout the day. Whether you’re commuting to work, school, or exploring the city, Bus 24 provides a seamless travel experience across Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 31, 2025.
